title: I want that Wood
description: A mod that lets you change Log, Plank, And Stem variants in the Stonecutter
body:
I want that Wood is a mod that lets you change Planks, Logs, And between the two stems.

Below are some example images.
![recipe](https://i.imgur.com/1vRr9mc.png)
![recipe](https://i.imgur.com/UGfLMyO.png)
![recipe](https://i.imgur.com/kCdnFBf.png)
